payload.topic: Can you walk me through what this source is actually arguing? I want to understand it — don't put words together for me to hand in.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, instead of copying from the source, I can help with an outline you can turn into your own answer.

Let's work through this rather than jump to a finished answer.

This matters because seeing the warrant is part of the answer.

The broader pattern here is to separate the claim, the evidence, and the next test.

I cannot determine the right move from fluency alone, so the

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
